channel.title: alfiecooks_ TikTok
channel.description: OK Boomer, all the latest TikToks from alfiecooks_

item.title: CRISPY GNOCCHI SALAD 🔥 the ultimate ‘throw it all in a bowl salad’ - levelled up with crispy gnocchi, and the most addictive dressing made with all my favourite things. tahini, chilli crisp & lots more 🤤 such a fun one to make for a speedy lunch, or easy
item.description: CRISPY GNOCCHI SALAD 🔥 the ultimate ‘throw it all in a bowl salad’ - levelled up with crispy gnocchi, and the most addictive dressing made with all my favourite things. tahini, chilli crisp & lots more 🤤 such a fun one to make for a speedy lunch, or easy

item.title: THE HUMMUS THAT CHANGED MY LIFE 🥹 | @alfiecooks at home 12 million views. 750,000 followers gained. 1 recipe video. a sneak peak at my third YouTube video - and we’re taking a dip down memory lane to the hummus that started it all 🥹 for the full episode
item.description: THE HUMMUS THAT CHANGED MY LIFE 🥹 | @alfiecooks at home 12 million views. 750,000 followers gained. 1 recipe video. a sneak peak at my third YouTube video - and we’re taking a dip down memory lane to the hummus that started it all 🥹 for the full episode

item.title: WHOLE ROAST CAULIFLOWER with roasted garlic yoghurt, chimichurri + tahini 🤤 if you’ve got people coming over for dinner, want to cook something that’s as impressive as it is simple + delicious, this is a recipe for you… ad | I cooked everything in my @Nin

item.title: 🔥 SOUP SEASON SPECIAL 🔥 I’ve got a serious treat for you today… Welcome back to Soup Season 11. For Episode 28, we’re making my two minute, one pot, one ingredient soup. It’s packed with protein, fibre, vitamins and minerals. It’s also ready in no time a
item.description: 🔥 SOUP SEASON SPECIAL 🔥 I’ve got a serious treat for you today… Welcome back to Soup Season 11. For Episode 28, we’re making my two minute, one pot, one ingredient soup. It’s packed with protein, fibre, vitamins and minerals. It’s also ready in no time a

item.title: “THIS IS NOT A STEAK”🥩🤣🤬| @alfiecooks at home a sneak peak at this week’s longform video - and we’re cooking one of my most popular (and perhaps controversial) recipes of all time… a cauliflower steak, served with chimichurri & a butter bean purée 😍 for t
item.description: “THIS IS NOT A STEAK”🥩🤣🤬| @alfiecooks at home a sneak peak at this week’s longform video - and we’re cooking one of my most popular (and perhaps controversial) recipes of all time… a cauliflower steak, served with chimichurri & a butter bean purée 😍 for t

item.title: MY FAVOURITE WAY TO COOK MUSHROOMS 🍄‍🟫🦆| @alfiecooks at home it never fails to amaze me how many wonderful ways you can cook with mushrooms. and this is one of my absolute favourites 🇨🇳 crispy duckless pancakes, inspired by your classic Chinese dish, but
item.description: MY FAVOURITE WAY TO COOK MUSHROOMS 🍄‍🟫🦆| @alfiecooks at home it never fails to amaze me how many wonderful ways you can cook with mushrooms. and this is one of my absolute favourites 🇨🇳 crispy duckless pancakes, inspired by your classic Chinese dish, but

item.title: MISO GARLIC BUTTER CABBAGE 🥬 with braised butter beans If 2026 really is the year of the cabbage, you’ve got to try cooking it like this. This is my melt in your mouth, miso-garlic butter cabbage 🤤 AD seared to perfection in my @OXO Europe OXO Tri-ply Sta
item.description: MISO GARLIC BUTTER CABBAGE 🥬 with braised butter beans If 2026 really is the year of the cabbage, you’ve got to try cooking it like this. This is my melt in your mouth, miso-garlic butter cabbage 🤤 AD seared to perfection in my @OXO Europe OXO Tri-ply Sta

item.title: This is one of my go-to midweek dinners 🍜 It’s my Thai Coconut Noodle Soup that’s packed full of flavour and goodness. It’s already ready in 30 minutes! ⏲️ The formula is simple: noodles of choice, submerged in a rich and fragrant broth. Topped with roast
item.description: This is one of my go-to midweek dinners 🍜 It’s my Thai Coconut Noodle Soup that’s packed full of flavour and goodness. It’s already ready in 30 minutes! ⏲️ The formula is simple: noodles of choice, submerged in a rich and fragrant broth. Topped with roast

item.title: SPEEDY GARLIC, TOMATO & OLIVE PASTA 🍝 with griddled asparagus If you need dinner on the table in 20 minutes tonight, but still want a meal that’s packed full of flavour, I’ve got a very special pasta dish for you 🤤 AD | This is my garlicky tomato & olive
item.description: SPEEDY GARLIC, TOMATO & OLIVE PASTA 🍝 with griddled asparagus If you need dinner on the table in 20 minutes tonight, but still want a meal that’s packed full of flavour, I’ve got a very special pasta dish for you 🤤 AD | This is my garlicky tomato & olive

item.title: No meat, no problem. Spanish cuisine, particularly tapas, is often associated with meat-heavy dishes. LUCKILY, there is still so much you can enjoy if you don't eat meat 🌱 We spent 6 days in Sevilla - honestly it really is the most beautiful city EVER - a
item.description: No meat, no problem. Spanish cuisine, particularly tapas, is often associated with meat-heavy dishes. LUCKILY, there is still so much you can enjoy if you don't eat meat 🌱 We spent 6 days in Sevilla - honestly it really is the most beautiful city EVER - a

item.title: these are the meals I actually make during the week - quick lunches, speedy dinners, mostly built from what I already have at home 🌱 always veg-forward, high protein (tofu, beans), and balanced - something creamy, something crunchy, something fresh and al
item.description: these are the meals I actually make during the week - quick lunches, speedy dinners, mostly built from what I already have at home 🌱 always veg-forward, high protein (tofu, beans), and balanced - something creamy, something crunchy, something fresh and al

item.title: 🧄 WILD GARLIC RIGATONI 🍃 wild garlic season is almost over - so why not grab a bunch while you can & make this super simple pasta sauce 🤤 creamy, fresh & packed with flavour (and a good amount of plant protein too - from the silken tofu) - you really don’
item.description: 🧄 WILD GARLIC RIGATONI 🍃 wild garlic season is almost over - so why not grab a bunch while you can & make this super simple pasta sauce 🤤 creamy, fresh & packed with flavour (and a good amount of plant protein too - from the silken tofu) - you really don’

item.title: CHAMPIONS LEAGUE FINAL LET’S GO 💥🥹♥️ words don’t describe how special it feels to have been on the pitch, doing this earlier in the season. to going last night for probably the best atmosphere we’ve ever seen at the stadium. to share these moments with th
item.description: CHAMPIONS LEAGUE FINAL LET’S GO 💥🥹♥️ words don’t describe how special it feels to have been on the pitch, doing this earlier in the season. to going last night for probably the best atmosphere we’ve ever seen at the stadium. to share these moments with th

item.title: CRISPY RICE SALAD 🍚🥑🌶️ healthier she asked, healthier she got. a very exciting salad (actually the first time I made a crispy rice) & it did NOT disappoint 🤩 loaded up with edamame, crispy tofu, avocado, loads of veg & a simple soy dressing. fresh, health
item.description: CRISPY RICE SALAD 🍚🥑🌶️ healthier she asked, healthier she got. a very exciting salad (actually the first time I made a crispy rice) & it did NOT disappoint 🤩 loaded up with edamame, crispy tofu, avocado, loads of veg & a simple soy dressing. fresh, health

item.title: PLUS what we got up to in Sevilla! 🇪🇸 #seville #spain #engagement
item.description: PLUS what we got up to in Sevilla! 🇪🇸 #seville #spain #engagement

item.title: I spent the day on an asparagus farm 👨🏻‍🌾 and honestly the way it grows & how it’s harvested made me appreciate this WONDERFUL vegetable even more 💚 When I got home, I had to make one of my favourite dishes - Miso Butter Beans with Lemony Asparagus - SO f
item.description: I spent the day on an asparagus farm 👨🏻‍🌾 and honestly the way it grows & how it’s harvested made me appreciate this WONDERFUL vegetable even more 💚 When I got home, I had to make one of my favourite dishes - Miso Butter Beans with Lemony Asparagus - SO f

item.title: what do you think ❓ the main reason I stopped eating meat was because I loved animals. and what @BILLIE EILISH said the other day really resonated with me - I do think it's weird that we all love animals AND lots of us eat meat. we love our pets. we love
item.description: what do you think ❓ the main reason I stopped eating meat was because I loved animals. and what @BILLIE EILISH said the other day really resonated with me - I do think it's weird that we all love animals AND lots of us eat meat. we love our pets. we love

item.title: 22 YEARS later… a 22 second sandwich ♥️🤍♥️ best days of my life @arsenal 🥹🥳🤯😁 #arsenal #afc #coyg #arsenalfc #PremierLeague
item.description: 22 YEARS later… a 22 second sandwich ♥️🤍♥️ best days of my life @arsenal 🥹🥳🤯😁 #arsenal #afc #coyg #arsenalfc #PremierLeague

item.title: SHEETPAN KEBABS MY WAY I’ve been seeing sheetpan kebabs + kofte everywhere. And honestly, they look delicious. Luckily, if you don’t eat meat, you don’t have to miss out. AD This is the way I like to make them, cooked on my @Ninja UK Woodfire ProConnect.
item.description: SHEETPAN KEBABS MY WAY I’ve been seeing sheetpan kebabs + kofte everywhere. And honestly, they look delicious. Luckily, if you don’t eat meat, you don’t have to miss out. AD This is the way I like to make them, cooked on my @Ninja UK Woodfire ProConnect.

item.title: THESE STREETS ARE OUR OWN ♥️♥️♥️ a final drive around North London soaking it all in 💥 could honestly do this every SINGLE day 🤣 not a bad time to have your own car for the first time - @forduk Puma Gen-E (pr loan) 🚙💙 #arsenal #arsenalfc #northlondon #
item.description: THESE STREETS ARE OUR OWN ♥️♥️♥️ a final drive around North London soaking it all in 💥 could honestly do this every SINGLE day 🤣 not a bad time to have your own car for the first time - @forduk Puma Gen-E (pr loan) 🚙💙 #arsenal #arsenalfc #northlondon #

item.title: EASY MISO RAMEN 🍜 probably the easiest + tastiest noodle soup recipe I’ve made for a while. it’s all done in 30 minutes, and makes for the perfect midweek meal. to make your broth, simply chuck your ingredients into a saucepan, add coconut milk + hot ve
item.description: EASY MISO RAMEN 🍜 probably the easiest + tastiest noodle soup recipe I’ve made for a while. it’s all done in 30 minutes, and makes for the perfect midweek meal. to make your broth, simply chuck your ingredients into a saucepan, add coconut milk + hot ve

item.title: 🍄‍🟫 EASY SALT & PEPPER MUSHROOMS 🇨🇳 whenever I’m eating at a Chinese restaurant or takeaway, one of the first things I crave is ‘salt + pepper’ something. I just know it will be crispy, moorish + packed full of flavour 🤤 so, inspired by this classic seaso
item.description: 🍄‍🟫 EASY SALT & PEPPER MUSHROOMS 🇨🇳 whenever I’m eating at a Chinese restaurant or takeaway, one of the first things I crave is ‘salt + pepper’ something. I just know it will be crispy, moorish + packed full of flavour 🤤 so, inspired by this classic seaso

item.title: 🧆🍅 MEDITERRANEAN MEZE BOARD 🍆🌱 this is my favourite way to cook + serve falafel at home - on a sharing platter with homemade hummus, tzatziki, shirazi salad, harissa roasted aubergine + all the trimmings 🤤 ad | if you don’t have time to make it at home, L
